Name: Azure Web App - Restart
Description:
Restarts an azure web app.
*

Note This template is designed to run against an azure web app octopus target

* *

Depends on Azure CLI and powershell to be installed on the running machine

*

Parameters.Name: azWebApp.AzureAcct
Parameters.Label: Azure Account
Parameters.HelpText: The azure account that has access to the web app

Parameters.Name: azWebApp.StartIfStopped
Parameters.Label: Start if stopped
Parameters.HelpText: If the web app is stopped, start it
